allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: merge claude.md into AGENT.md

Fold project overview, tech stack, repo layout, commands, architecture
notes, env vars, code style, and testing conventions from claude.md into
AGENT.md. AGENT.md takes precedence on project identity, change discipline,
and SDLC workflow. claude.md retained as source artifact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C ~/code add AGENT.md .gitignore && git -C ~/code rm --cached claude.md && git -C ~/code status)
